official_sources.evidence: FMFW.io HitBTC-family API documentation includes spot and futures fee/order-related surfaces and private trading WebSocket surfaces.

runtime_isolation: Current FMFW.io profile stays spot-only at runtime; futures/margin/perpetual support needs explicit product scope guards and must not reuse spot private paths implicitly.
unsupported_runtime_reason: FMFW.io futures/margin/perpetual surfaces are official, but this profile only promotes Spot lifecycle/readbacks; derivatives metadata, positions/risk and order reconciliation are not wired.
required_auth_and_scope: read-only and trade permission validation for margin/futures/perpetual
private WS or REST reconciliation policy for derivatives state
unsafe_to_promote_without: futures/margin metadata separated from spot symbols
remaining_work: separate FMFW.io futures/margin metadata from spot symbols
add position, margin and risk parser fixtures
promote private auth/order runtime only after product-scope and dry-run validation
